findings.title: Author email exposed in plugin.json
findings.description: The plugin.json manifest includes the author email 'dev@vooban.com' in plain text. While this is a team email rather than a personal one, it is distributed to every machine that installs the plugin and could be harvested for spam or social engineering.
findings.recommendation: Remove the email field from plugin.json or replace it with a URL to a contact page. The author name alone is sufficient for attribution.
